body.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 700 210" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="每一项都乘公分母的示意图">
        <g font-family="Noto Sans SC, sans-serif" font-size="15">
          <text x="350" y="26" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#8A9795">两边同乘公分母 6：每一项头上都要罩住，一个都不能漏</text>

          <!-- terms -->
          <rect x="70"  y="70" width="120" height="60" rx="10" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0E7C9B"/>
          <text x="130" y="106" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">x／2</text>

          <rect x="230" y="70" width="120" height="60" rx="10" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0E7C9B"/>
          <text x="290" y="106" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">x／3</text>

          <rect x="440" y="70" width="120" height="60" rx="10" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#15A06A"/>
          <text x="500" y="106" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">5</text>

          <text x="205" y="107" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#4C5A58">+</text>
          <text x="400" y="107" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#4C5A58">=</text>

          <!-- ×6 tags over each term -->
          <text x="130" y="58" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#0A5E76" font-weight="700">×6</text>
          <text x="290" y="58" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#0A5E76" font-weight="700">×6</text>
          <text x="500" y="58" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#0F7D52" font-weight="700">×6</text>

          <!-- results -->
          <text x="130" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">= 3x</text>
          <text x="290" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">= 2x</text>
          <text x="500" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">= 30</text>

          <text x="350" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#8A9795">得到 3x + 2x = 30，分母全部消失</text>
        </g>
      </svg>
